message:
feat(vc_store): add sys_fallback_samples table for baseline probing

Adds new SQLite table for always-on baseline system monitoring:

**sys_fallback_samples table:**
- machine_id, collected_at: Composite primary key
- uptime_seconds: System uptime
- load1/5/15: Load averages
- mem_total/available/used_bytes: Memory metrics
- swap_total/used_bytes: Swap metrics
- disk_usage_json: JSON array of mount point usage
- raw_output: Raw probe output for debugging

This provides a fallback data source when richer collectors
(sysmoni, caut) are unavailable, ensuring baseline visibility
is always maintained via simple SSH/proc probes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,3 +22,5 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 anyhow.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+proptest.workspace = true
+mockall.workspace = true

@@ -30,6 +30,24 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collector_status (
     PRIMARY KEY (machine_id, collector_name)
 );
 
+-- Fallback system probe samples (always-on baseline)
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sys_fallback_samples (
+    machine_id TEXT,
+    collected_at TIMESTAMP,
+    uptime_seconds BIGINT,
+    load1 REAL,
+    load5 REAL,
+    load15 REAL,
+    mem_total_bytes BIGINT,
+    mem_available_bytes BIGINT,
+    mem_used_bytes BIGINT,
+    swap_total_bytes BIGINT,
+    swap_used_bytes BIGINT,
+    disk_usage_json TEXT, -- [{mount, total, used, avail, pct}]
+    raw_output TEXT,
+    PRIMARY KEY (machine_id, collected_at)
+);
+
 -- System metrics samples
 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sys_samples (
     machine_id TEXT,
